notes: Wave 12 Track C candidate (remaining international UN days).

Date and history confirmed via WebSearch (English + Arabic): Oct 16 marks FAO's founding anniversary (1945); proposed by the Hungarian delegation (led by former Agriculture Minister Dr. Pál Romány) at FAO's 20th Conference session in Rome, November 1979; ratified by UN General Assembly on 5 December 1980; first observed 16 October 1981; now marked in 150+ countries.

Competitor check: mosoah.com/mawdoo3.com are shallow encyclopedic pieces, fatafeat.com/yummy.layalina.com take a cooking/food angle, alarabiya.net/youm7.com are seasonal news pieces with food-waste tips — none give the precise founding-story timeline or a countdown/FAQ page.
countryScope: all (shared international day, generates per-country alias pages).
